samples:
I had to go and see her
She told me everything was fine
And when I asked "How are you?"
Her answer was "I'm just fine"


Have you heard the rumours?
About a new king in town
He wants his throne back now, I should tell him it's mine
And I want it back too!


Lost myself inside of circles
Never thought about getting out of sight
Tried to put an end to all this suffering
But no one would listen


Can't stop the river flowing
Won't let this moment flow away
Gazing through smoke and dust for answers
Don't care if it gets in my way


Lost myself inside of circles
Never thought about getting out of sight
Tried to put an end to all this suffering
But no one would listen

Blindness is our curse (blindness)
Blindness is our curse (blindness)
Blindness is our curse (blindness)
Blindness is our curse

Lost in thought and lost in space
I felt the morning breeze blow
And it carried my name away
I was longing to be free


Time is running out
A wish has come true
All that I've wanted to do...


Long journey back, long way home
For better times have not yet come
And as time goes by, distance grows
Still there are reasons for sorrow


Time is running out
A wish has come true
All that you wanted to do...


Long journey back, long way home
For better times have not yet come
And as time goes by, distance grows
Still there are reasons for sorrow


Time is running out
A wish has come true
All that you wanted to do...

Have no fear of what may come, you can change the world
Have no fear of what may come, you can change the world
Have no fear of what may come, you can change the world
Have no fear of what may come, you can change the world

A single moon
Reflecting the moonlight
Upon your face
Illuminating your smile


You cannot see that I love you
Even when I tell you so


Blind faith is all around
In a cage of reason, I drown
And I embrace my fate
I was born into this race

Lost in my thoughts and alone with myself
There's no escape from these demons inside me
This obsession is eating away at me
I can feel it consuming me whole

Still running... Still running... Still running... Still running...

Blind faith is all around
In a cage of reason, I drown
And I embrace my fate
I was born into this race


Blind faith is all around
In a cage of reason, I drown
And I embrace my fate
I was born into this race



Running... Running... Running... Running...
Running... Running... Running... Running...
Running... Running... Running... Running...
Running... Running... Running... Running...

Dumb questions from me...
Lost in the fog of sorrow, I lie here alone and forsaken...
You're the reason for my pain
Aching wounds are bleeding now, just a matter of time before they run dry
I wish I never loved you


It hurts so much to leave this land that holds us both together
We have nothing left to prove anymore
And we both know it
Don't say goodbye


The fire is fading away
But we cannot let go
There's still love between us
Please don't leave me alone



I can see myself falling
Into an abyss I can not get out of....




"Once again the world forgot to care"


Leave me alone!
Leave me alone!
Leave me alone!


Lost in the fog of sorrow, I lie here alone and forsaken...
Lost in the fog of sorrow, I lie here alone and forsaken...
Lost in the fog of sorrow, I lie here alone and forsaken...
Lost in the fog of sorrow, I lie here alone and forsaken...

There are things I would do if the devil came to my door
And made me a god, but he said nothing and went back
Out of sight. But when you're alone there is no one around, yeah
No reason for being afraid unless you want it so
No reason to be sad anymore, now that I know how
You feel about me


Ahhhhhhhhhh

I was told not to speak with you until I knew what I felt
In these arms that held me tight
When we kissed you spoke out "I love" in whispers low
I thought I saw tears running down your face


Ahhhhhhh


You said those words into my skin then left
But somehow they never faded away
Oh Lord forgive me if this is wrong
For all eternity I will pray


Ahhhhhhhhhhhh

Leave me alone please
Stay away from me
Leave me alone please
Stay away from me
Leave me alone please
Stay away from me
Leave me alone please
Stay away from me

There's no escape
I am trapped in a maze
My soul is ablaze
My heart is aching for what it knows
Lost in space, lost on purpose
Dream state I enter now


Open the door to another world
Slip inside and let my spirit fly
Take my hand and guide me there
Help me find my way
Into the night
Inside you can hear nothing but silence
And that voice crying out for love

Leave all behind, leave this old shell
Leave alone, come back soon
Give us peace, give us time
Set us free, release the spell
Enter your mind
Outside is wild, dangerous land
We fight within the walls of our minds
Stay with me awhile until dawn appears
You are one of a kind
Don't ever forget
Never part again
This is our destiny, always and forever more...
Until then we shall meet again in another realm
Until then we shall meet again in another realm



No matter how long and hard you try
In vain try to forget what came before
How could you do this to me?
I thought you cared
But now I know why

Lost in a maze of dreams
Of fire and ice and steel
I'm falling from grace to dust beneath my feet
You gave me love but I could not see
The wounds you were hiding underneath your skin
It hurts, it hurts too much...


Please don't leave alone
Leave me be alone
For now, for now only the moon is watching me


Once again the stars collide
New worlds are born on high
An ancient tale told through fire and smoke
A long time ago...

Howl at me, "Leave"
There's no need to try
Break down my walls, pull me down
And let me bleed myself dry

Lost in a maze of dreams
Of fire and ice and steel
I'm falling from grace to dust beneath my feet
You gave me love but I could not see
The wounds you were hiding underneath your skin
It hurts, it hurts too much...


Please don't leave alone
Leave me be alone
For now, for now only the moon is watching me

When the morning comes,
I'll bring a fire to light you
You say you wish me harm


The words I spoke that night
Were meant for you alone
But now I give them back
Out of control
Lost all feeling
All reason gone mad
Willing my demise with this sword

There is no reason to live anymore...
And the world was round at last
Nowhere to hide from your gaze
No reasons left to try
This time around it seems
Reason turned against yourself and me

Love came like an avalanche
Destroyed our little home
But now we have each other in shame

There is no reason to live anymore...
And the world was round at last
Nowhere to hide from your gaze
No reasons left to try
This time around it seems
Reason turned against yourself and me



Once upon a time you loved her
She took you by the hand
Said "Leave me alone" she cried
Before you could understand

I've lost myself in the maze of lies
You tell me now is mine alone to bear
When I was falling down from grace
There was a light that shined so bright and pure


So, turn my gaze away from this plight
Don't let me hear your name again



Lost along the way to higher ground
We are caught up in our schemes
A child dies for no reason at all
Innocent blood flows through her veins

"She spoke these words before she died"

Take my hand, lead me where you want
Into a better place...



Lost along the way to higher ground
We are caught up in our schemes
A child dies for no reason at all
Innocent blood flows through her veins

"She spoke these words before she died"

Bring her home...





Lost along the way to higher ground
We are caught up in our schemes
A child dies for no reason at all
Innocent blood flows through her veins

Lost in a forest
I can't find my way home
Out in the wilderness
The wild is so lone


A circle of trees
Surrounded me round
Their branches entwined
And covered the ground


She opened her arms, said "come"
Her skin was so smooth and clear


I went inside where she sleeps
Underneath her white dress I fell asleep
Until morning came


She touched my face and said
"Sleep now"


Don't go away, stay with me for awhile
Stay with me tonight
Stay with me always

Pale moonlight cast shadows on her face
Still sleeping, but awake
Her body in flames
"Wake up"



Pale moonlight cast shadows on her face
Still sleeping, but awake
Her body in flames
"Wake up"


Once upon a time there was a tree called Yggdrasil
It stood alone in the middle of the world like an idol
Old and crooked it had long lost its strength
Dead leaves falling from the trees were just lying below
